name: TVMaze API
description: TVMaze is a community-driven TV show and episode information API. It provides comprehensive data on TV shows, episodes, cast, crew, schedules, and people. Free tier available with rate limiting (20 calls per 10 seconds per IP). CORS enabled for cross-origin requests.
